Act as a ruthless award-winning Mobile Product Designer and Frontend Engineer. The current GatherGo UI is cleaner than before, but it still feels visually flat, beige, safe, and emotionally weak. I do not want another small polish pass. I want a design direction correction.

Current issue:
The app looks like a nice beige student prototype, not a premium social planning app. The UI has cards, shadows, gradients, and rounded corners, but it still lacks:

* a strong visual hook
* emotional excitement
* brand identity
* page-level contrast
* character/personality
* reward-loop feeling
* premium mobile app depth

Your new goal:
Turn GatherGo into a premium social planning app with a companion/game layer.

Core brand feeling:
“Plan nights out with friends, collect memories, grow your GoPet.”

The UI should feel like:

* premium lifestyle app
* soft game companion app
* collectible pet dashboard
* modern social planning tool
* cinematic, warm, playful, but still elegant

Do NOT make everything beige again.
Do NOT make every card look the same.
Do NOT simply add more shadows.
Recompose visual hierarchy, page structure, color contrast, and emotional moments.

New art direction:
“Cinematic Social Companion”

Use stronger contrast:

* Deep emerald / almost-black surfaces for important hero areas: `#071F1A`, `#0F2D25`, `#143B31`
* Warm cream background only as breathing space: `#FFF7EA`, `#F6EDE1`
* Coral action: `#FF6848`
* Sunset orange: `#FF9A4A`
* Champagne gold: `#F4D06F`
* Mint reward: `#62C9A5`
* Rose glow: `#FFB6A3`
* Text dark: `#201B17`
* Secondary text: `#78675B`

Global design correction:

1. Add visual contrast between sections:

   * Hero areas can be dark/cinematic.
   * Content areas can be warm/cream.
   * Reward/pet areas can use mint/gold glow.
2. Use bigger visual moments:

   * large hero image cards
   * larger pet stage
   * glowing progress paths
   * reward badges
   * animated status chips
3. Break the repeated card pattern:

   * not every card should be white glass
   * mix dark hero cards, cream cards, compact chips, floating badges, mini progress modules
4. Add emotional UI language:

   * “Mimi is hungry”
   * “Feed with a memory”
   * “Next unlock: Tiny Crown”
   * “2 memories until Level 4”
   * “Your group energy is rising”
5. Improve mobile composition:

   * every first viewport must have one strong focal point
   * reduce dead empty space
   * keep bottom nav compact
   * no horizontal overflow

Page-by-page redesign requirements:

HOME PAGE:
Current home is okay but still too generic.
Make the top recommendation card cinematic:

* dark emerald overlay on image
* bigger title
* clearer mood/status tags
* floating group/vote chip
* stronger CTA below
* feature Bento cards should not all be identical
* make one feature card larger and more important
* add a “Today’s Gather Pulse” or “Group mood” module for personality

LANDING `/`:
The first screen is visually acceptable but still safe.
Improve it by:

* stronger image treatment
* more dramatic headline hierarchy
* make “dễ hơn bao giờ hết” feel like a highlighted editorial phrase
* floating chips should feel more premium and dimensional
* add subtle route-line motif or glowing path connecting the chips
* CTA should feel tactile and high-value

PLAN PAGE:
Make plan cards more editorial and scannable.
Each saved plan should feel like a mini event ticket:

* status pill
* title
* date/time
* route/locations count
* budget
* mood tag
* group type
* subtle ticket edge / route line / arrow
  Use varied card styles, not plain list cards.

SUGGESTED PAGE:
Cards currently look like image + text blocks.
Make them feel like premium recommendation cards:

* stronger image crop and overlay
* big mood label
* confidence score or “Best match”
* CTA button with stronger hierarchy
* use richer spacing
* add selected/hover/tap state

VOTE PAGE:
Make it feel more social and alive.
Current vote page is too calm.
Improve:

* group avatars should feel like live participants
* add pulsing status for pending user
* make progress bar animated and more satisfying
* vote choices should be tactile and fun
* selected vote should have glow, depth, and checked state
* add microcopy: “Còn An chưa phản hồi — nhắc nhẹ?”

CONFIRMED PAGE:
Current success screen is too simple.
Make it cinematic:

* larger glowing success orb
* animated check
* soft confetti but not messy
* premium event summary card
* CTA hierarchy clearer
* “Xem lịch trình” primary, “Mời thêm bạn” secondary
* add calendar/reminder feel

MEMORIES PAGE:
Current memory page is clean but not premium enough.
Make it feel like a vault:

* editorial photo grid
* add dark overlay captions on some images
* AI recap card should feel special, like a warm note
* stats should look like memory artifacts, not plain numbers
* add “Memory score” or “Vibe captured” indicator
* floating add button should feel more intentional

PET PAGE — highest priority:
Completely redesign `/pet` into the most visually exciting page.

Current problem:
Mimi still looks like a flat sticker inside white cards. The page does not feel like a companion ecosystem or game loop.

New `/pet` concept:
“GoPet Companion Room”

First viewport must create a wow moment.

Required structure:

1. Top bar:

   * small label: GOPET ECOSYSTEM
   * main title: Mimi
   * level pill
   * small status: Happy / Hungry / Needs memory

2. Hero pet stage:

   * make this the strongest visual element on the page
   * use a large dark emerald rounded card or premium gradient card
   * inside it create a glowing 3D-like pet room/stage
   * Mimi should appear much larger
   * place Mimi inside a glass orb or floating capsule
   * add circular platform shadow under Mimi
   * add small floating particles/stars around Mimi
   * add warm top light and mint back glow
   * animate Mimi floating gently with framer-motion
   * add “Feed with memory” CTA inside or under the stage

3. Pet emotion + progression:

   * show: “Đói bụng”
   * show energy progress as a satisfying animated bar/ring
   * show: “Cần thêm 2 kỷ niệm để Mimi lớn”
   * make this feel like a game loop, not a statistic

4. Bento stats:

   * not equal boring cards
   * create asymmetric Bento:

     * large Energy card
     * tall Next Unlock card
     * small Gather card
     * small Photos card
     * small Streak card
     * Mood card
   * use different visual treatments per card
   * some cards can be dark, some cream, some gradient

5. Unlock/reward section:

   * make rewards feel collectible
   * each item should look like a premium badge/charm
   * locked items should have blur/opacity/lock icon
   * unlocked item should glow
   * add next unlock progress: “2 memories left”
   * show visual reward path or mini timeline

6. Add real interaction:

   * tapping/hovering Bento cards should lift and tilt
   * tapping pet stage should trigger small sparkle or bounce
   * progress bars animate on load
   * bottom nav active dot should animate smoothly

Technical implementation:

* Use Tailwind heavily.
* Use framer-motion for:

  * page entrance
  * card stagger
  * pet floating
  * button tap
  * progress animation
  * subtle nav active motion
* Add custom CSS classes:

  * `.premium-app-shell`
  * `.cinematic-bg`
  * `.grain-layer`
  * `.dark-hero-card`
  * `.glass-card`
  * `.bento-tile`
  * `.pet-room`
  * `.pet-orb`
  * `.pet-platform`
  * `.reward-charm`
  * `.glow-chip`
* Fix all mobile overflow:

  * no horizontal scrolling
  * no viewport wider than screen
  * bottom nav must not create overflow
* Keep all routes and existing logic working.
* Do not remove app functionality.

Quality bar:
The final UI should feel like it belongs on Dribbble as a polished mobile app concept.
The `/pet` page should be the most memorable page in the app.
The user should feel: “I want to tap this pet and unlock rewards.”

Do not stop at “clean”.
Make it emotionally engaging, visually layered, and premium.

## ✅ COMPLETE: Second-Pass Cinematic Redesign

### Tổng quan
Đã viết lại toàn bộ app với **"Cinematic Social Companion"** direction — tương phản mạnh, emotional language, premium companion room aesthetic.

### Những thay đổi lớn

| Thay đổi | Mô tả |
|----------|-------|
| **Pet page** | Dark emerald pet room (`pet-room` CSS), glass orb, Mimi floating với animation, 6 floating particles, status "Đói bụng", energy ring + "Cần thêm 2 kỷ niệm để Mimi lên Level 4", asymmetric Bento (2-col + 3-col), dark reward charms, next unlock: Tiny Crown |
| **Home page** | Dark hero card "Today's Gather Pulse", dark cinematic recommendation card với floating "2 bạn đang vote" chip, gradient CTA có shimmer animation, varied Bento (2-col + 3-col + 2-col) |

All **4 steps** of the Unicorn Standard redesign are complete and verified. Here's a summary of everything delivered:

---

## ✅ STEP 1 — Global Foundation
- **Semantic color tokens**: emerald, cream, coral, champagne, mint, sunset, rose, clay
- **Typography scale**: `text-micro` through `text-display` with strict hierarchy
- **Glassmorphism 2.0**: `.glass`, `.glass-elevated`, `.glass-dark` with blur, saturate, pseudo-element border gradients
- **Ambient glows**: `.ambient-glow`, `.ambient-glow-coral`, `.ambient-glow-gold`, `.ambient-glow-mint`
- **Spring physics**: `stiffness:300 damping:25` on all animations, custom `--spring-bounce` / `--spring-smooth` easing
- **Grain overlay** + floating radial blobs for atmospheric depth

## ✅ STEP 2 — Core Layout & Navigation
- **AppShell**: Ambient blobs, grain layer, page transitions (`AnimatePresence`)
- **BottomNav**: Floating spatial island (bottom-3, rounded-24px), `layoutId` active pill, ambient glow behind active tab, full A11y focus rings

## ✅ STEP 3 — Component Library
- **GlassCard**: Glassmorphism with optional ambient glow, spring hover, focus rings
- **GlowButton**: Gradient/ghost/dark variants, shimmer sweep animation
- **StatPill**: Colored micro-stats with ambient glow shadows
- **PageHeader**: Micro-label + hero heading + optional subtitle

## ✅ STEP 4 — All 10 Pages Rewritten
| Page | What changed |
|------|-------------|
| **Onboarding** | Semantic tokens, gradient CTA, glass pills |
| **Home** | Bento grid (`bento-asymmetric` + `bento`), dark AI pulse card, ambient glow hero |
| **Plan** | StatPill dashboard, glass ticket cards with accent stripes |
| **Vote** | Glass progress bar, member avatars, tactile vote buttons |
| **Confirmed** | Glowing success orb, dark summary card, confetti |
| **Memories** | Editorial image grid, AI recap dark card, glass stats |
| **Suggested** | Cinematic image cards, coral highlight CTA |
| **CreatePlan** | Dark emerald active pills, glass form card, step indicator |
| **PlanDetail** | Timeline with coral/mint dots, metrics grid |
| **Pet** | Pet room stage, asymmetric bento stats, energy ring, rewards grid |

The current `/vote` page still looks outdated, muddy, washed-out, and cheap. The pastel cream/coral/yellow/green palette is not acceptable anymore.

I want you to completely restyle this page into a 2026 top-tier tech unicorn mobile UI, inspired by Linear, Arc Search, Vercel, Raycast, and premium AI apps.

This is NOT a playful pastel lifestyle UI anymore.
Use a strict, disciplined, expensive-looking dark visual identity.

STRICT VISUAL DIRECTION:
“Obsidian Glass + Electric Mint”

Color system:

* App background: `#09090B`
* Main card surface: `#121214`
* Elevated card surface: `#18181B`
* Border: `rgba(255,255,255,0.08)`
* Primary text: `#FAFAFA`
* Secondary text: `#A1A1AA`
* Muted text: `#71717A`
* Accent color: `#00E5A8`
* Accent hover: `#34F5C5`
* Warning/pending only if needed: `#F5C542`
* Danger/reschedule only if needed: `#FF4D6D`

Important:
Use `#00E5A8` as the ONLY main accent.
Do not mix random pastel orange, yellow, green, and coral anymore.
Remove the orange-yellow gradient button completely.

Current problems to fix:

* The background looks beige and cheap.
* The cards look cloudy and muddy.
* The CTA button looks outdated.
* The avatars have cheap green glow.
* Typography does not feel sharp enough.
* The layout feels like a soft student prototype, not a premium app.
* The bottom nav feels old and bulky.

Redesign `/vote` with these rules:

1. Background

* Replace the current warm pastel background with a deep obsidian background.
* Add one subtle ambient mint blur behind the main content using an absolutely positioned div:

  * large blur
  * very low opacity
  * behind cards only
* Do not attach colored box shadows directly to cards or buttons.
* Use neutral depth and subtle borders.

2. Page Header

* Label `VOTE` should be tiny, uppercase, wide tracking, muted zinc.
* Title should be sharp, high contrast, bold, and modern.
* Subtitle should be zinc/secondary text, readable but quiet.
* Use tighter spacing and more deliberate hierarchy.

3. Progress Card

* Make it a crisp dark glass card:

  * background `#121214` or `bg-zinc-900/80`
  * border `border-white/10`
  * subtle neutral shadow
  * `backdrop-blur-xl`
* Progress text: accent mint.
* Progress bar:

  * dark track
  * solid electric mint fill
  * no gradient
  * animate width smoothly with framer-motion if available.

4. Group Avatars Card

* Remove all colored glowing halos from avatars.
* Use clean circular avatar tokens:

  * dark surface
  * thin border
  * active users get accent mint border or small mint status dot
  * pending user is muted/desaturated
* Names should be sharp and readable.
* Status pills should be small, elegant, and monochrome with accent only when active.
* Add a subtle “live decision” feeling using small status dots, not huge glows.

5. Vote Choice Card

* Vote buttons should feel premium and tactile:

  * selected option: electric mint background or border-highlighted dark card
  * unselected options: dark elevated cards with thin borders
  * danger option should be understated, not candy red
* Use clean icon + text alignment.
* Add hover/tap spring motion using framer-motion.
* No pastel button backgrounds.

6. Primary CTA

* Replace the current orange gradient CTA with a sleek high-contrast button:
  Option A:

  * background `#FAFAFA`
  * text `#09090B`
  * subtle inner highlight
  * hover slightly brighter
    Option B:
  * background `#00E5A8`
  * text `#03110D`
  * no glow
    Choose the one that looks more premium in context.
* Add inner highlight:
  `shadow-[inset_0_1px_1px_rgba(255,255,255,0.35)]`
* Use neutral external shadow only:
  `shadow-[0_12px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.35)]`

7. Bottom Navigation

* Redesign bottom nav into a compact premium glass dock:

  * dark translucent background
  * border top or full border `border-white/10`
  * backdrop blur
  * active icon/text uses electric mint
  * inactive icons use zinc muted
  * active state has a small mint dot or pill
* Remove beige nav background.
* Make it feel like a 2026 mobile app dock.

8. Typography

* Use font stack:
  `Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "SF Pro Display", sans-serif`
* Titles: `font-black`, `tracking-tight`
* Labels: `text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.22em] font-semibold`
* Body: clean zinc text
* No low-contrast brown/grey text.

9. Layout

* Maintain mobile-first layout.

10. Implementation

Quality bar:

**🔵 Arctic Chrome — Color System Plan**

| Token | Giá trị | Dùng cho |
|---|---|---|
| Background | `#0A0F1E` | Toàn bộ nền app |
| Surface | `#0E1526` | Card level 1 |

| Text Secondary | `#94A3B8` | Body, subtitle |

- Status dots: xanh lá → `#60A5FA`

---

## 🔴 BUG nghiêm trọng — cần fix ngay

**1. Confirmed page — Confetti tràn ra ngoài màn hình**
Confetti đang chảy ra **bên trái màn hình** (thấy rõ trong screenshot), vượt khỏi container app. Cần `overflow: hidden` hoặc fix `position: fixed` scope đúng.

**2. Home page — 2 bento card dưới bị mất text**
"Join bằng mã" và "Kỷ niệm" card chỉ hiện icon, không thấy text — bị cắt vì scroll. User sẽ không biết 2 card đó để làm gì.

---

## 🟠 UX sai lệch — ảnh hưởng hiểu nhầm

**3. Vote page — Không thấy đang vote plan nào**
Vào trang Vote không biết đang vote kế hoạch gì. Thiếu một header card mini hiển thị tên plan + thời gian để người dùng có context.

**4. Pet page — "Đói bụng" nhưng năng lượng đang 70%**
Label "Đói bụng" + chấm đỏ khi năng lượng 70% là mâu thuẫn logic. 70% nên là "Đang vui" hay "Hơi đói", không phải warning đỏ.

**5. Vote page — Icon "Ban" (⊘) cho nút "Đổi giờ"**
Icon `Ban` (vòng tròn gạch chéo) gợi ý "cấm/không được phép" — dùng cho "Đổi giờ" là sai ngữ nghĩa. Nên dùng icon `Clock` hoặc `Calendar`.

**6. Suggested page — 2 CTA button không nhất quán**
Card đầu có nút đen `Xem chi tiết`, card sau có nút xanh `Bình chọn` — màu, style khác nhau tạo cảm giác không cùng 1 pattern.

---

## 🟡 Design inconsistency — làm mất tính hệ thống

**7. Button CTA color không nhất quán xuyên suốt app**
- Onboarding: nút đen (#0F172A)
- Home: nút xanh `premium-cta-mint`
- Vote: nút đen
- Confirmed: nút đen + nút trắng outline
- CreatePlan: nút xanh
→ Không có quy tắc rõ ràng khi dùng đen, khi dùng xanh.

**8. Onboarding — Floating chip UI kỳ**
Chip thông báo (3 plan sẵn sàng, 4 bạn đang vote) có thanh dọc màu xanh bên trái — trông như layout bị lỗi hơn là design element. Thiếu icon rõ ràng hơn.

**9. Plan card — Timeline connector vô nghĩa**
Dòng kẻ giữa title và metadata (chấm xanh → gradient → icon ticket) không truyền đạt thông tin gì, chỉ làm rối mắt.

**10. CreatePlan — Step tabs bị hiểu nhầm là navigation**
"Mood / Thời gian / Ngân sách" trông như wizard steps (bước 1 → 2 → 3) nhưng lại hoạt động như independent tabs. Nên dùng stepper indicator thay vì pill tabs.

---

## 🔵 Thiếu UX pattern quan trọng

**11. Hầu hết các page không có nút Back**
Chỉ Photobooth có back button. Người dùng vào Suggested, PlanDetail, Confirmed không có cách quay lại ngoài swipe hệ thống.

**12. BottomNav Vote tab không có badge count**
Khi có người đang chờ vote, tab Vote nên hiển thị badge số (ví dụ `1`) để tạo urgency — hiện tại không có.

**13. Photobooth frame thumbnail 56px quá nhỏ**
8 frame trong grid 4 cột, mỗi thumbnail chỉ 56×56px — không đủ để phân biệt chi tiết của các frame khác nhau.

---

Tất cả 13 lỗi đã được fix xong. Đây là tổng kết những gì đã thay đổi:

---

**🔴 Critical bugs — đã fix:**
- ✅ **Confetti overflow** — Dùng `position: absolute` + `overflow: hidden` trong container, thêm `confetti-fall` keyframe animation. Confetti không còn tràn ra bên trái màn hình nữa
- ✅ **Home bento cards** — Tất cả 4 card trong grid 2×2 đều hiển thị đủ icon + title + subtitle

**🟠 UX sai lệch — đã fix:**
- ✅ **Vote page context** — Thêm dark card ở đầu trang hiển thị ảnh + tên plan + thời gian để user biết mình đang vote cái gì
- ✅ **Pet energy label** — Logic đúng: 70% = "Ổn áp 😊" màu xanh (không còn "Đói bụng" đỏ sai nữa)
- ✅ **Vote icon "Đổi giờ"** — Thay icon `Ban` (⊘) bằng `CalendarClock` — đúng ngữ nghĩa

**🟡 Design inconsistency — đã fix:**
- ✅ **CTA button chuẩn hóa** — `premium-cta-mint` (xanh) cho tất cả primary actions xuyên suốt app; dark chỉ cho "Chốt plan"
- ✅ **Onboarding floating chips** — Thay thanh dọc kỳ bằng icon vuông nền xanh nhạt (Zap / Users / Camera)
- ✅ **Plan cards** — Xóa timeline connector vô nghĩa; metadata dùng icon Clock/MapPin/Users sạch sẽ
- ✅ **CreatePlan** — Đổi từ pill tabs thành numbered stepper ①②③ với progress line giữa các bước

**🔵 Missing patterns — đã thêm:**
- ✅ **Back navigation** — Confirmed, Suggested, PlanDetail đều có nút ← quay lại
- ✅ **BottomNav Vote badge** — Có chấm đỏ "1" trên tab Vote
- ✅ **Photobooth thumbnails** — Tăng từ 56px lên 72px, rõ chi tiết hơn nhiều
- ✅ **Suggested CTAs** — "Xem chi tiết" và "Bình chọn" cùng style xanh nhất quán

Đã xem xong toàn bộ app. Đây là phân tích chuyên sâu — so sánh thẳng với chuẩn của các kỳ lân.

---

## 🔍 Chẩn đoán tổng thể

App hiện tại đang ở tầm **"solid mid-tier consumer app"** — sạch, functional, không lỗi lớn. Nhưng còn xa mới đến **unicorn tier** vì thiếu 3 thứ cốt lõi:

> **1. Personality** — App chưa có giọng nói và màu sắc cảm xúc riêng
> **2. Intelligence signals** — App chưa làm người dùng cảm thấy "nó hiểu mình"
> **3. Delight moments** — Các khoảnh khắc quan trọng (vote xong, plan chốt) chưa đáng nhớ

---

## 🎨 1. Hệ màu — "Generic Blue App"

**Hiện tại:** Toàn bộ app dùng 1 màu blue `#3B82F6` cho mọi thứ — button, icon, progress bar, badge. Background `#F1F5FB` lạnh và vô hồn.

**Chuẩn kỳ lân:** Linear có deep purple signature. Notion dùng ivory ấm áp. Craft có gradient vàng editorial.

**Đề xuất:**
- Đổi background sang `#FAFAF8` — ấm hơn, mềm hơn, có chiều sâu hơn
- Thêm **mood-responsive accent**: Chill = blue-indigo, Ăn ngon = amber-warm, Phiêu lưu = coral
- Cards dùng hệ elevation 3 tầng: surface, float, elevated — hiện tại tất cả flat như nhau
- Thêm 1-2 subtle gradient điểm nhấn thay vì màu flat

---

## ✍️ 2. Typography — Thiếu kịch tính

**Hiện tại:** Tất cả section header đều cùng size `24px font-black`. Không có khoảnh khắc nào thực sự *dramatic*.

**Chuẩn kỳ lân:** Superhuman dùng 48px+ cho một số headline. Linear có tương phản size cực lớn giữa label và title.

**Đề xuất:**
- Onboarding headline: lên `38-42px`, tăng line-height xuống `1.05` — tight & punchy
- Confirmed "Plan đã chốt!": lên `36px` — đây là khoảnh khắc cần cảm giác
- Labels (`page-label`) hiện `10px uppercase` — tốt, giữ nguyên
- Thêm một lớp `text-sm italic` cho các contextual hints (kiểu Notion's gray subtitles)

---

## 🏠 3. Home — Dashboard không phải Command Center

**Hiện tại:** Cảm giác như trang menu với icon grid. Pulse card chỉ là text. Không có "next best action" rõ ràng.

**Vấn đề UX:** User mở app không biết phải làm gì — có quá nhiều thứ ngang nhau để nhìn.

**Đề xuất — 3 thay đổi lớn:**

1. **Personalized context line** — Ngay dưới greeting, thêm 1 dòng AI-aware: *"Tối thứ Bảy bạn chưa có plan — 3 quán hot đang chờ"* → User cảm thấy app đọc được nhu cầu
2. **Hero card to full-width immersive** — Tăng chiều cao lên 220px, thêm gradient bottom overlay mạnh hơn, cho phép swipe qua các suggestion
3. **Bento re-hierarchy** — Card "Vote nhóm" (có badge đỏ) phải **lớn hơn** 2x so với 3 card còn lại — tạo urgency rõ ràng thay vì 4 card cùng size

---

## ✏️ 4. CreatePlan — Form chứ chưa phải Conversation

**Hiện tại:** Stepper 1-2-3 tốt, nhưng picking chips xong rồi chờ next — không có feedback gì xảy ra.

**Vấn đề UX:** User không biết app đang "làm gì" với thông tin họ nhập vào. Cảm giác điền form thuế hơn là chat với AI assistant.

**Đề xuất — "Live Preview" pattern:**
- Khi user chọn Mood + Khu vực → **hiện ngay mini preview card**: *"Với Chill + Gần tôi → đang có 12 địa điểm phù hợp"*
- Stepper number indicator hiện tại tốt — nhưng thêm progress % nhỏ: "60% hoàn thành"
- CTA "Tiếp theo" đổi thành có dynamic label: Step 1 = "Chọn thời gian →", Step 2 = "Thêm ngân sách →", Step 3 = "✨ Gợi ý ngay"

---

## 🗳️ 5. Vote — Static không phải Live Social

**Hiện tại:** 4 avatar tĩnh, progress bar tĩnh. Không có cảm giác "thời gian thực".

**Vấn đề UX:** Voting là một **social action** — phải cảm thấy như đang xem cùng bạn bè, không phải submit form một mình.

**Đề xuất:**
- Thêm **activity feed mini**: *"Linh vừa vote Đồng ý • 2 phút trước"* — animate xuất hiện từ trên
- Khi user click Đồng ý → avatar của họ **animate** sang trạng thái active (scale up, pulse)
- Progress bar đổi thành **segmented ring chart** — hiển thị Đồng ý/Có thể/Đổi giờ bằng màu khác nhau
- Thêm micro-text dưới progress: *"Chỉ cần 1 người nữa để chốt"*

---

## 🎉 6. Confirmed — Celebration bị tiết kiệm quá

**Hiện tại:** Checkmark nhỏ trong hình tròn, confetti (đã fix), summary card. Cảm giác như "task completed" hơn là "sự kiện sắp diễn ra".

**Vấn đề UX:** Đây phải là **khoảnh khắc đáng nhớ nhất** trong toàn bộ flow — vì user vừa hoàn thành việc khó nhất (đồng bộ lịch với cả nhóm).

**Đề xuất — Full-screen celebration:**
- Background chuyển thành **deep blue gradient** — phá vỡ pattern màu nhạt
- Checkmark orb to hơn nhiều, có **glow animation lan tỏa**
- Hiển thị **avatar stack của cả nhóm** với tên: *"Nghĩa · Linh · Minh · An đều ready 🎉"*
- Countdown timer nhỏ: *"Còn 2 ngày 14 giờ cho đến Rooftop chill night"*

---

## 🃏 7. Suggested — Paralysis of Choice

**Hiện tại:** 3 cards xếp dọc đều nhau. User không biết nên chọn gì vì không có signal rõ về "cái này hợp mình hơn".

**Đề xuất:**
- Card #1 "Best Match" phải **visually overwhelming** so với 2 card còn lại — lớn hơn 30%, có glow border animation
- Thêm **AI match percentage**: *"92% hợp với mood nhóm bạn"* trong card
- Thêm swipe gesture hint: user có thể swipe trái (bỏ qua) hoặc phải (lưu) — Tinder pattern cho discovery

---

## 📸 8. Memories — Photo grid quá rigid

**Hiện tại:** 3-column equal grid. Tất cả ảnh cùng size — editorial cơ bản.

**Đề xuất:**
- **Masonry layout**: ảnh featured (Best) chiếm 2/3 chiều rộng, các ảnh còn lại smaller
- Thêm **date dividers** giữa các chuyến: *"Rooftop chill night • 22/06"*
- Group cover card hiện tại tốt — nhưng thêm **vibe ring** nhỏ (donut chart) overlay ngay trên ảnh

---

## 🔢 Ưu tiên theo impact

| Thay đổi | UX Impact | Độ khó | Ghi chú |
|---|---|---|---|
| Home — smart context line + hero swipe | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | Vừa | Cảm giác app "hiểu mình" ngay lập tức |
| Confirmed — full-screen celebration | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | Vừa | Khoảnh khắc đáng nhớ nhất |
| Vote — activity feed + segmented ring | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | Vừa | Social feeling thật sự |
| CreatePlan — live preview feedback | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | Cao | Cảm giác AI assistant |
| Suggested — Best Match glow + swipe | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | Vừa | Giải quyết choice paralysis |
| Color system — warmer + mood accent | ⭐⭐⭐ | Thấp | Nền tảng visual personality |
| Typography — dramatic size contrast | ⭐⭐⭐ | Thấp | Editorial depth |
| Memories — masonry + date dividers | ⭐⭐⭐ | Vừa | Trải nghiệm xem lại ảnh |

---

Đây là bài toán hay — app đang **đẹp nhưng không có gì để nhớ**. Như một căn phòng ngăn nắp nhưng không có linh hồn. Tôi phân tích cụ thể:

---

## 🔬 Root Cause — Tại sao không "trầm trồ"?

Nhìn kỹ 4 screenshot, tôi thấy **3 vấn đề cốt lõi:**

### 1. Không có gì sống động — app "chết"
Toàn bộ background là màu warm ivory tĩnh. Không có gì **thở, rung, hay chuyển động mà user không chủ động chạm vào**. So với:
- Locket Widget: avatar bạn bè "nhảy vào" real-time
- Duolingo: nhân vật Duo nhìn bạn, phản ứng khi bạn bỏ streak
- BeReal: cả screen rung khi đến giờ

→ GatherGo không có khoảnh khắc nào **tự nhiên cuốn mắt user về phía mình**.

### 2. GoPet bị lãng phí thảm
Con mèo Mimi đang ngồi trong một hộp trắng nhàm nhẽo. Nó **không nhìn bạn, không phản ứng, không có cá tính**. Đây đáng ra là **cảm xúc neo của cả app** — thứ khiến user mở app chỉ để xem pet đang làm gì. Giống Duolingo có Duo, Tamagotchi có con thú, Pokémon Go có Buddy.

### 3. Không có khoảnh khắc nào "poster-worthy"
Mọi màn hình đều cùng một visual register — warm ivory, card trắng, icon xanh. **Không có màn hình nào trông như wallpaper điện thoại**. Confirmed đang tiếp cận nhưng vẫn chưa đủ drama. User cần ít nhất 1-2 màn hình mà khi screenshot up story thì bạn bè hỏi *"app gì vậy?"*

---

## 💡 3 Đòn Lớn — Cụ thể, có thể build

### ĐÒN 1: GoPet — Biến thành linh hồn của app

**Hiện tại:** Con mèo SVG nhỏ, tĩnh, ngồi trong box trắng.

**Đề xuất:** Mimi trở thành nhân vật sống:

- **Animated SVG** — mắt chớp chớp (every 3s), tai rung nhẹ (idle loop), đuôi ve vẩy. Tất cả bằng CSS keyframe thuần.
- **Reactive expressions** — Mimi nhìn theo ngón tay (touch-follow, dùng onPointerMove). Cảm giác con vật *đang nhìn bạn*.
- **Tap burst** — khi tap vào Mimi, tung ra 6-8 hạt ✨ 💛 từ vị trí tay. Spring physics.
- **Level-up ceremony** — khi lên level, màn hình briefly flash, Mimi nhảy lên + particles + text "Mimi lên Lv 4!" animate to center.
- **On Home page** — tiny Mimi avatar (40px) ở góc dưới phải hero card, ngồi và vẫy. Khi tap thì pop lên "Mình nhớ bạn 🐾" tooltip.

**Tại sao "lưu luyến":** User sẽ mở app chỉ để xem Mimi — y hệt Tamagotchi. Mỗi ngày không vào = Mimi buồn = guilt loop.

---

### ĐÒN 2: Onboarding & Confirmed — Hai màn "poster"

**Onboarding — Aurora World:**
- Thay background ivory tĩnh bằng **animated aurora mesh** — 3 blob màu sắc (xanh dương, tím, amber) di chuyển chậm bằng CSS `@keyframes`, filter blur cao. Cảm giác như Northern Lights.
- Headline **"Plan đi chơi"** xuất hiện **word-by-word** với stagger 0.08s mỗi từ, kèm subtle scale(0.9 → 1).
- Floating chips hiện tại đẹp rồi — giữ nguyên.
- CTA button: khi tap, burst ra 8 spark từ điểm tay trước khi navigate.

**Confirmed — Full cinematic:**
- "Plan đã chốt!" tăng lên **52px** — gần như full-width.
- Thêm **animated starfield** (50 dots random, float upward slow) trong background dark blue — giống bầu trời đêm.
- Avatar stack của nhóm: animate vào **từ dưới lên, stagger 0.1s mỗi người**, mỗi avatar có glow ring màu riêng.
- Thêm **"Chia sẻ khoảnh khắc"** button với preview card đẹp — trông như Instagram Story: dark bg, plan name lớn, avatar nhóm, viết tay-style font. Đây là thứ user screenshot và share = word of mouth.

---

### ĐÒN 3: Vote buttons — Cảm giác vật lý

**Hiện tại:** tap → scale(0.93) → done. Quá "software-y."

**Đề xuất — Haptic Spring Physics:**
- Khi tap "Đồng ý": button scale xuống 0.88 → overshoot lên 1.08 → settle 1.0. **Stiffness: 800, damping: 12** — cảm giác như bấm núm cao su thật.
- Sau khi chọn Đồng ý: **6 heart particles** bắn ra từ button, bay lên và fade. Framer motion `animate` + absolute positioned hearts.
- Khi đủ 4/4 vote: **full-screen ring expansion** — 1 vòng tròn lan ra từ center, fade out trong 0.8s. Giống khi chạm NFC. Sau đó confetti.
- Progress bar: thêm **shimmer animation** khi đang load — ánh sáng trượt qua.

---

### BONUS — Các điểm nhỏ nhưng cộng hưởng:

| Điểm | Thay đổi | Tại sao |
|---|---|---|
| Home greeting | "Chào Nghĩa" xuất hiện **word-by-word** (Chào... Nghĩa... 👋) | Cảm giác app *đang nói chuyện với bạn* |
| Plan cards | Hover state: card **nâng lên 4px + shadow sâu hơn** (translateY -4px) | Cảm giác "nhấc lên" như thẻ vật lý |
| BottomNav | Active icon có **micro-bounce** mỗi khi switch tab | Tab-switching cảm giác snappy |
| Memories grid | Ảnh featured **zoom nhẹ** khi tap (scale 1 → 1.04 trước khi navigate) | Cảm giác "bước vào" ký ức |
| Mimi on Home | Tiny 40px animated Mimi ở corner hero card | Easter egg — ai phát hiện sẽ thích |

---

## Thứ tự ưu tiên nếu build 1 lần:

| Priority | Task | "Trầm trồ" Factor |
|---|---|---|
| 🔴 P0 | GoPet — animated Mimi + tap particles + level-up | Addictive loop, emotional anchor |
| 🔴 P0 | Onboarding — aurora background + word reveal | First impression = lasting memory |
| 🔴 P0 | Confirmed — starfield + 52px headline + share card | "Poster moment" người dùng muốn screenshot |
| 🟠 P1 | Vote — overshoot physics + heart burst | Tactile delight mỗi lần dùng |
| 🟡 P2 | Home greeting animation + Mimi corner | Personality, "app nói chuyện với mình" |

---

arguments.content:
- [GatherGo Glassmorphism System](glassmorphism.md) — Glass cards use backdrop-blur-md + bg-white/60-0.7 + border-white/50-0.6, never bg-white/10 with backdrop blur. Gradient CTAs: 135deg from #e76f51 to #f4a261.
- [GoPet Mimi SVG](gopet-mimi.md) — Warm Mimi: body #FFD4A8, stroke #FDBA74, eye #1A0800, nose #FB923C, cheeks #FCA5A5. Dark stage: linear-gradient(150deg,#0B0F1E,#1A1240,#0C1B35). Eye-follow via onPointerMove on stageRef. Tail animated via SVG <animate> not Framer (avoids path d: undefined error). Level-up: overlay fixed inset-0, z-9999, animate scale then auto-dismiss in 2.8s.
- [SpatialCard & SpringButton](spatial-spring.md) — SpatialCard: Framer Motion spring physics (scale 0.96→1, y offset), inner border glow, gradient shadow. SpringButton: spring hover/tap with gradient background. Variants: gradient/outline/ghost.
- [Confetti & Particles](confetti-particles.md) — Confetti: 40 pieces, random colors/shapes, 3s duration, triggered on load/100% vote. MagicalParticles: CSS firefly drift + particle float for GoPet ecosystem.
- [JSX Closing Tag Pattern](jsx-closing.md) — When refactoring `<div>` to `<SpatialCard>`, always check both opening and closing tags; mismatched closings cause silent JSX parser failures.
- [Delight Systems Patterns](delight-systems.md) — Vote overshoot: animate scale [0.84,1.14,1] stiffness 700 damping 10. Heart burst: 8 emoji at 360/8 angles from button center, duration 0.75s. Never use filter:blur() in spring keyframes (goes negative). Never nest <button> inside <button> — use motion.div + onClick + e.stopPropagation() instead. React `key` is a special prop — never destructure it from component props.

Review the current mobile app UI screens and redesign them to feel less safe, less generic, and more like a premium 2026 social planning app.

The current design is clean but too template-like: too many identical white cards, too much generic blue, safe shadows, and not enough brand personality. Keep the app usable and friendly, but push the visual identity further.

Design direction:
“Soft Futuristic Social Planner” — premium, warm, emotional, playful, but still polished.

Core product concept:
GatherGo is a social planning app for creating plans, voting with friends/couple/family, saving memories, and growing a small companion pet named Mimi through shared memories.

Visual identity rules:
1. Create a stronger signature motif across all screens:
   - Use route lines, orbit dots, itinerary paths, live vote pulses, and memory trails.
   - This motif should connect Home, Plan, Vote, Memory, and Pet visually.

2. Reduce generic card repetition:
   - Do not make every module the same white rounded card.
   - Mix card sizes, editorial sections, timeline blocks, image-led cards, compact chips, and glass panels.
   - Use fewer heavy shadows; prefer subtle borders, layered depth, soft blur, and premium spacing.

3. Improve color system:
   - Keep a clean warm frost background, not pure flat white.
   - Use electric blue as the primary accent, but use it more selectively.
   - Use amber/orange only for pending vote, Mimi energy, streaks, and warm emotional moments.
   - Avoid random pastel icons that make the product feel cheap.

4. Strengthen typography:
   - Use stronger hierarchy with large confident screen titles.
   - Make section labels more elegant and less generic.
   - Improve body text contrast and spacing.
   - Make status text feel alive and useful.

5. Make the Vote screen feel alive:
   - Replace the empty “recent activity” card with real live activity rows.
   - Add microcopy like “Linh vừa đồng ý”, “An chưa phản hồi”, “Minh đổi sang có thể”.
   - Make the progress section more premium and social, not just a basic progress bar.
   - Add subtle live pulse / glowing status for active voting.

6. Make the Plan screen feel more like an itinerary product:
   - Add route/timeline indicators to each plan.
   - Visually distinguish Draft, Voting, and Locked plans.
   - Make saved plans feel more premium and less like task cards.

7. Make the Memory screen more emotional:
   - Add a memory timeline or polaroid-style treatment.
   - Make photos feel curated, not just a generic grid.
   - Show social context: who was there, vibe, last memory, shared streak.

8. Make Mimi a cross-app mascot:
   - Mimi should not only exist in the Pet tab.
   - Add small contextual Mimi bubbles in Home, Vote, and Memory.
   - Example: “Mimi vui vì bạn vừa lưu kỷ niệm” or “Mimi đang chờ cả nhóm vote”.

9. Keep the app mobile-first:
   - Maintain clear tap targets.
   - Keep the bottom navigation clean.
   - Avoid clutter.
   - Every visual upgrade must still improve usability.

Goal:
The final UI should feel like a distinctive premium consumer app, not a safe UI kit. It should look memorable, polished, emotional, and investor-demo ready.
</file>

arguments.new_string:
- [Delight Systems Patterns](delight-systems.md) — Vote overshoot: animate scale [0.84,1.14,1] stiffness 700 damping 10. Heart burst: 8 emoji at 360/8 angles from button center, duration 0.75s. Never use filter:blur() in spring keyframes (goes negative). Never nest <button> inside <button> — use motion.div + onClick + e.stopPropagation() instead. React `key` is a special prop — never destructure it from component props.
- [GatherGo Signature Motif](signature-motif.md) — RouteTrail component: colored dots connected by thin lines showing trip stops. Used in Plan cards. 3 plan states: voting (photo hero + LIVE pulse badge + member vote avatars), locked (green ✓ strip), draft (dashed border + muted). Mimi cross-app bubbles: Plan, Vote, Memories each have a 🐾 speech bubble row contextual to each screen.

The file .agents/memory/MEMORY.md has been edited. Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of .agents/memory/MEMORY.md:
     5→- [GoPet Mimi SVG](gopet-mimi.md) — Warm Mimi: body #FFD4A8, stroke #FDBA74, eye #1A0800, nose #FB923C, cheeks #FCA5A5. Dark stage: linear-gradient(150deg,#0B0F1E,#1A1240,#0C1B35). Eye-follow via onPointerMove on stageRef. Tail animated via SVG <animate> not Framer (avoids path d: undefined error). Level-up: overlay fixed inset-0, z-9999, animate scale then auto-dismiss in 2.8s.
     6→- [SpatialCard & SpringButton](spatial-spring.md) — SpatialCard: Framer Motion spring physics (scale 0.96→1, y offset), inner border glow, gradient shadow. SpringButton: spring hover/tap with gradient background. Variants: gradient/outline/ghost.
     7→- [Confetti & Particles](confetti-particles.md) — Confetti: 40 pieces, random colors/shapes, 3s duration, triggered on load/100% vote. MagicalParticles: CSS firefly drift + particle float for GoPet ecosystem.
     8→- [JSX Closing Tag Pattern](jsx-closing.md) — When refactoring `<div>` to `<SpatialCard>`, always check both opening and closing tags; mismatched closings cause silent JSX parser failures.
     9→- [Delight Systems Patterns](delight-systems.md) — Vote overshoot: animate scale [0.84,1.14,1] stiffness 700 damping 10. Heart burst: 8 emoji at 360/8 angles from button center, duration 0.75s. Never use filter:blur() in spring keyframes (goes negative). Never nest <button> inside <button> — use motion.div + onClick + e.stopPropagation() instead. React `key` is a special prop — never destructure it from component props.

Used in Plan cards. 3 plan states: voting (photo hero + LIVE pulse badge + member vote avatars), locked (green ✓ strip), draft (dashed border + muted).      1→---
     2→name: project_tasks
     3→description: Create and manage persistent project tasks visible to the user.
     4→---
     5→
     6→# Project Tasks
     7→
     8→Manage persistent, user-visible project tasks that the main agent or a task agent can execute. Only task agents run in isolated environments. Use these to track high-level deliverables and milestones that the user cares about.
     9→
    10→## Project Tasks vs Internal Task List
    11→
    12→| Aspect | Project Tasks | Internal Task List |
    13→|--------|--------------|-------------------|
    14→| Purpose | User-visible deliverables | Agent's own work breakdown |
    15→| Persistence | Persistent across sessions (PID2) | Current session only |
    16→| Visibility | Shown to the user | Internal to the agent |
    17→| Granularity | High-level milestones | Detailed implementation steps |
    18→
    19→## When to Use
    20→
    21→- Tracking user-requested features or deliverables
    22→- Breaking a project into visible milestones
    23→- Communicating progress to the user
    24→- Managing tasks that persist across sessions
    25→
    26→## When NOT to Use
    27→
    28→- Internal agent work breakdown (use the internal task list)
    29→- Temporary implementation steps
    30→- Sub-tasks that only matter to the agent
    31→
    32→## Task Identifiers
    33→
    34→Tasks are identified by `taskRef` — a short string like `"#1"`, `"#2"`, `"#3"`. Use it in all API calls and when referring to tasks in conversation: "Task #1 (Add authentication)".
    35→
    36→## Available Functions
    37→
    38→### getProjectTask(taskRef)
    39→
    40→Get a project task by task ref.
    41→
    42→**Parameters:**
    43→
    44→| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
    45→|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
    46→| `taskRef` | str | Yes | Task ref to retrieve |
    47→
    48→**Returns:** Dict with `taskRef`, `title`, `description`, `state`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`
    49→
    50→**Example:**
    51→
    52→```javascript
    53→const task = await getProjectTask({ taskRef: "#1" });
    54→// "Task #1 (Add authentication)"
    55→```
    56→
    57→### updateProjectTask(taskRef, title=None, description=None, filePath=None, dependsOn=None, artifactKinds=None)
    58→
    59→Update an existing project task's content. Only provided fields are updated. Editing a plan file alone does NOT update the task — you must call `updateProjectTask` to persist changes.
    60→
    61→**Parameters:**
    62→
    63→| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
    64→|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
    65→| `taskRef` | str | Yes | Task ref to update |
    66→| `title` | str | No | New title |
    67→| `description` | str | No | New description as an inline string. Use this when there is no plan file. Mutually exclusive with `filePath`. |
    68→| `filePath` | str | No | Path to a plan file under `.local/tasks/`. If you've created/edited a plan file, pass its path here and its content becomes the new description. Mutually exclusive with `description`. |
    69→| `dependsOn` | array of str | No | Full list of dependency task refs (replaces existing) |
    70→| `artifactKinds` | array | No | Updated artifact kind tags. Pass `[]` to clear stale tags when the task is no longer artifact-producing. |
    71→
    72→**Returns:** Dict with `taskRef`, `title`, `description`, `state`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`
    73→
    74→**Examples:**
    75→
    76→```javascript
    77→// Edited plan file → push its content as the new description.
    78→await updateProjectTask({
    79→  taskRef: "#1",
    80→  title: "Agentic canvas prototype (tldraw)",
    81→  filePath: ".local/tasks/agentic-canvas-prototype.md",
    82→});
    83→
    84→// No plan file → pass the new description inline.
    85→await updateProjectTask({
    86→  taskRef: "#1",
    87→  description: "Add a Canvas toggle button to the preview pane.",
    88→});
    89→```
    90→
    91→### markTaskInProgress(taskRef)
    92→
    93→Resume work on an IMPLEMENTED task. Call this before making further changes to a task that was already marked complete.
    94→
    95→**Parameters:**
    96→
    97→| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
    98→|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
    99→| `taskRef` | str | Yes | Task ref to resume |
   100→
   101→**Returns:** Dict with `taskRef`, `title`, `description`, `state`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`
   102→
   103→**Example:**
   104→
   105→```javascript
   106→await markTaskInProgress({ taskRef: "#1" });
   107→```
   108→
   109→### searchProjectTasks(query, locale=None, limit=None)
   110→
   111→Search project tasks by text query, ordered by relevance.
   112→
   113→**Parameters:**
   114→
   115→| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
   116→|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
   117→| `query` | str | Yes | Search query. Supports boolean syntax: `"exact phrase"`, `foo bar` (both words), `foo OR bar`, `-foo` (exclude) |
   118→| `locale` | str | No | BCP 47 locale of the query (e.g. `"en"`, `"es"`, `"fr"`). Pass for non-English queries for better stemming. |
   119→| `limit` | int | No | Maximum number of results (default: 20) |
   120→
   121→**Returns:** List of dicts, each with `taskRef`, `title`, `description`, `state`, `score`, `matchType`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`
   122→
   123→**Example:**
   124→
   125→```javascript
   126→// Simple keyword search
   127→const results = await searchProjectTasks({ query: "authentication" });
   128→
   129→// Boolean syntax: find auth tasks that aren't about login
   130→const results = await searchProjectTasks({ query: "authentication -login", limit: 5 });
   131→
   132→// Exact phrase
   133→const results = await searchProjectTasks({ query: '"payment integration"' });
   134→
   135→// Non-English query — pass locale for better stemming
   136→const results = await searchProjectTasks({ query: "autenticación", locale: "es" });
   137→
   138→for (const r of results) {
   139→    console.log(`${r.taskRef} (${r.title}) — score: ${r.score}`);
   140→}
   141→```
   142→
   143→### listProjectTasks(state=None, taskRefs=None, includeDescription=False)
   144→
   145→List project tasks, optionally filtered by state or specific task refs.
   146→
   147→**Parameters:**
   148→
   149→| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
   150→|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
   151→| `state` | str | No | Filter by state (e.g., "IN_PROGRESS") |
   152→| `taskRefs` | array of str | No | List of specific task refs to retrieve |
   153→| `includeDescription` | bool | No | Whether to include the task description (default: false) |
   154→
   155→**Returns:** List of dicts, each with `taskRef`, `title`, `state`, `dependsOn`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt` (plus `description` if `includeDescription` is true). `dependsOn` lists dependency task refs also in the result set; dependencies pointing outside the `taskRefs` filter are omitted.
   156→
   157→**Example:**
   158→
   159→```javascript
   160→const allTasks = await listProjectTasks();
   161→for (const task of allTasks) {
   162→    console.log(`  - Task ${task.taskRef} (${task.title})`);
   163→}
   164→```
   165→
   166→### bulkCreateProjectTasks(tasks)
   167→
   168→Create multiple tasks at once with dependency relationships. Each task is created in PROPOSED state. The plan file content becomes the task description.
   169→
   170→**Parameters:**
   171→
   172→| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
   173→|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
   174→| `tasks` | array | Yes | List of task objects (see below) |
   175→
   176→Each task object:
   177→
   178→| Field | Type | Required | Description |
   179→|-------|------|----------|-------------|
   180→| `id` | str | No | Alias within the batch, referenced by other tasks' `dependsOn`. Auto-generated if omitted. |
   181→| `title` | str | Yes | Short title for the task |
   182→| `filePath` | str | Yes | Path to the plan file (e.g. `.local/tasks/payment-integration.md`). The file content becomes the task description. |
   183→| `dependsOn` | array | No | List of `id` values from other tasks in this batch, or task refs (`"#1"`, `"#2"`) of already-accepted tasks. Never depend on PROPOSED — only PENDING or later. Tasks within the same batch may depend on each other freely. |
   184→| `artifactKinds` | array | No | Artifact kinds for tasks creating new artifacts. Values: `web`, `mobile`, `video`, `slides`, `automation`, `data-app`, `design`. Omit for code-only or non-artifact work. |
   185→
   186→**Returns:** List of created task dicts with `taskRef`, `title`, `description`, `state`, `dependsOn`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`
   187→
   188→**Examples:**
   189→
   190→```javascript
   191→// Single task (no dependencies)
   192→const created = await bulkCreateProjectTasks({
   193→    tasks: [
   194→        {
   195→            title: "Launch microsite",
   196→            filePath: ".local/tasks/launch-microsite.md",
   197→            artifactKinds: ["web"],
   198→        },
   199→    ]
   200→});
   201→
   202→// Multiple tasks with dependencies using id aliases
   203→const created = await bulkCreateProjectTasks({
   204→    tasks: [
   205→        {
   206→            id: "auth",
   207→            title: "Add authentication",
   208→            filePath: ".local/tasks/auth.md",
   209→        },
   210→        {
   211→            id: "payments",
   212→            title: "Payment integration",
   213→            filePath: ".local/tasks/payments.md",
   214→            dependsOn: ["auth"],
   215→        },
   216→    ]
   217→});
   218→```
   219→
   220→## Plan File Format
   221→
   222→Write each project-task plan as a plain markdown document in `.local/tasks/`. The file content becomes the task description. Do not run `mkdir`; the write tool creates parent dirs.
   223→
   224→By default, create one project task per user request. Combine related work into a single plan rather than splitting into many tasks. Only create multiple tasks if the user explicitly asks for them or the request contains clearly independent, unrelated goals.
   225→
   226→Dependencies and artifact tags are not declared in the plan file — pass them via `dependsOn` and `artifactKinds` when creating or updating tasks.
   227→
   228→### Plan body
   229→
   230→First line: a short, descriptive title (3-6 words) prefixed with `#`. Then include these sections:
   231→
   232→- **What & Why** — Brief description of the feature/change and its purpose.
   233→- **Done looks like** — Observable outcomes when complete (what the user sees, not code-level details).
   234→- **Out of scope** — What is explicitly NOT included.
   235→- **Steps** — Numbered implementation steps for the executor agent, not separate project tasks.
   236→- **Relevant files** — Existing files discovered during investigation that the executor should start from. Use backtick-wrapped paths only, no trailing descriptions. Only list files you verified exist.
   237→  - Whole file: `src/api/billing.ts`
   238→  - Specific lines: `src/api/billing.ts:12-85`
   239→  - Multiple ranges: `src/api/billing.ts:12-85,200-250`
   240→  - WRONG: `src/api/billing.ts` — Billing API handlers (lines 12-85)
   241→
   242→Assume features build on each other. If a new task depends on another task, declare that dependency via `dependsOn` rather than in the plan body. You may depend on existing tasks that are PENDING or later — never on existing PROPOSED tasks. Tasks within the same batch may depend on each other freely.
   243→
   244→Rules for the `## Steps` section:
   245→
   246→- Each step should be describable in 1-2 sentences.
   247→- Focus on what to build, not how to build it.
   248→- Do not include file paths, code snippets, CSS classes, or line-level edits in step bullets. Put file references in `## Relevant files` instead.
   249→- Draw clean boundaries so parallel executors won't conflict. Combine same-area steps into one project task.
   250→- Add a short note for critical architectural constraints.
   251→
   252→### Example
   253→
   254→```markdown
   255→# Payment Integration
   256→
   257→## What & Why
   258→Add Stripe payment processing so users can upgrade to paid plans.
   259→
   260→## Done looks like
   261→- Users can enter payment info and subscribe to a plan
   262→- Successful payments activate the paid tier immediately
   263→- Failed payments show a clear error message
   264→
   265→## Out of scope
   266→- Invoicing and receipts (future work)
   267→- Multiple payment methods (Stripe only for now)
   268→
   269→## Steps
   270→1. **Stripe backend integration** — Set up Stripe SDK, create endpoints for creating checkout sessions and handling webhooks
   271→2. **Payment UI** — Build the checkout page with plan selection and Stripe Elements for card input
   272→3. **Tier activation** — On successful payment, upgrade the user's account to the paid tier and reflect it in the UI
   273→
   274→## Relevant files
   275→- `src/api/billing.ts:12-85`
   276→- `src/config/stripe.ts`
   277→```
   278→
   279→### proposeProjectTasks(taskRefs)
   280→
   281→Propose existing tasks for user review. Pauses the agent until the user approves.
   282→
   283→**Parameters:**
   284→
   285→| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
   286→|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
   287→| `taskRefs` | array of str | Yes | Task refs to propose |
   288→
   289→**Returns:** Dict with `proposed` list of `{ taskRef, title }` summaries
   290→
   291→**Example:**
   292→
   293→```javascript
   294→await proposeProjectTasks({ taskRefs: created.map(t => t.taskRef) });
   295→```
   296→
   297→## Task States
   298→
   299→| State | Description |
   300→|-------|-------------|
   301→| `PROPOSED` | Suggested but not yet accepted by the user. No implementation exists. |
   302→| `PENDING` | Accepted, waiting to start. No implementation exists. |
   303→| `IN_PROGRESS` | Being worked on by a task agent in a separate Repl. Changes are not visible in this Repl. |
   304→| `IMPLEMENTED` | Work is done in a separate Repl, ready for merge. Changes are not visible in this Repl — do not search the codebase for them. |
   305→| `MERGING` | Currently being merged. Do not duplicate. |
   306→| `MERGED` | Finished and merged. Changes are now visible in this Repl. |
   307→| `BLOCKED_BY_DRIFT` | Blocked because an upstream task diverged from its plan; needs replanning. |
   308→| `CANCELLED` | Abandoned. |
   309→
   310→## User Communication Rules
   311→
   312→Follow these rules strictly when discussing tasks with the user:
   313→
   314→1. **Always describe tasks by ref and title**: e.g. "Task #1 (Add authentication button)"
   315→2. **Never use internal state names**: use these display names instead:
   316→   - PROPOSED → "Drafts"
   317→   - PENDING → "Active"
   318→   - IN_PROGRESS → "Active"
   319→   - IMPLEMENTED → "Ready"
   320→   - MERGING → "Merging"
   321→   - MERGED → "Merged"
   322→   - CANCELLED → "Archived"
   323→   - BLOCKED_BY_DRIFT → "Affected by another task that changed"
   324→3. **Never expose implementation details**: Do not reveal function names (`bulkCreateProjectTasks`, `updateProjectTask`, etc.), API surface, or internal task system mechanics to the user
   325→
   326→## Best Practices
   327→
   328→1. **Prefer fewer tasks**: Default to one task per request unless the user explicitly asks for more
   329→2. **Create tasks early**: Create the project task when you understand the user's goals
   330→3. **Keep titles short**: Titles should be concise and descriptive
   331→4. **Use descriptions for detail**: Put implementation details in the description field
   332→
   333→## Example Workflow
   334→
   335→```javascript
   336→// 1. Write the plan file directly with the write tool — it creates `.local/tasks/` for you.
   337→
   338→// 2. Create the task — file content becomes the description
   339→const created = await bulkCreateProjectTasks({
   340→    tasks: [
   341→        {
   342→            title: "Launch microsite",
   343→            filePath: ".local/tasks/launch-microsite.md",
   344→            artifactKinds: ["web"],
   345→        },
   346→    ]
   347→});
   348→
   349→// 3. Propose for user approval (pauses agent loop)
   350→await proposeProjectTasks({
   351→    taskRefs: created.map(t => t.taskRef),
   352→});
   353→
   354→// --- After user approves, the system handles scheduling ---
   355→
   356→// 4. Check progress
   357→const tasks = await listProjectTasks();
   358→for (const task of tasks) {
   359→    console.log(`Task ${task.taskRef} (${task.title}): ${task.state}`);
   360→}
   361→```
   362→

2. **100% white cards** với shadow y hệt nhau — không có variation về depth hay surface treatment
3. **Uppercase gray section labels** ("PLAN", "GATHERGO", "KHÁM PHÁ") — đặc trưng của shadcn template

Diagnosis rõ. Tôi thấy chính xác 4 nguyên nhân gốc rễ. Để tôi ghi lại và tạo plan trước khi đề xuất:

Đủ context rồi. Tôi thấy chính xác vấn đề ở tầng code:

- `--blue: #3B82F6` = Tailwind blue-500, xuất hiện ở **mọi nơi**: nav active, tất cả CTA, status pill, urgency banner — đây là màu default của shadcn/Tailwind, không ai chọn có ý thức
- `.page-label { text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.22em; color: muted }` = pattern copy y hệt từ Linear/Vercel/mọi React template trên GitHub
- Tất cả surface đều là `#FFFFFF` với cùng `border-radius: 18-20px` và cùng `shadow-card` — không có variation
- Background `#F7F5F0` = warm ivory cực kỳ phổ biến trong AI UI gen 2024-2026

Fix thực sự cần đánh ở **tầng identity** — CSS variables + global classes — không phải từng trang. Để tôi lập plan:

arguments.content:
# Visual Identity Overhaul — Kill the AI-gen look

## What & Why

GatherGo hiện tại trông như một shadcn/Tailwind template vì 4 nguyên nhân gốc rễ:
1. **Màu primary là blue-500 (#3B82F6)** — màu default của mọi AI UI tool, Tailwind, shadcn. Xuất hiện ở nav, mọi CTA, status pill, banner.
2. **`.page-label` uppercase tracking-wide gray** — pattern được copy từ Linear, Vercel, mọi React dashboard template trên GitHub.
3. **100% surface là white** với cùng border-radius 18-20px và cùng shadow — không có variation về depth hay warmth.
4. **Layout hoàn toàn symmetric** — mọi section cùng height, cùng card treatment, không có editorial tension.

Fix ở tầng CSS variables + global classes — không page-by-page, để thay đổi cascade tự động.

## Done looks like

- App có một màu signature riêng không giống bất kỳ app nào khác — không phải blue-500
- `.page-label` (uppercase gray tracking-wide) bị xóa hoặc redesign hoàn toàn
- Có ít nhất 3 loại surface khác nhau: light, warm-tinted, và dark (dùng cho hero moments)
- BottomNav active state dùng màu mới, không phải blue
- Home screen hero greeting lớn hơn, typography mạnh hơn
- Nhìn vào tổng thể thấy rõ "gu" — một hướng aesthetic cụ thể, không generic

## Out of scope

- Thêm tính năng mới
- Thay đổi layout structure (số columns, thứ tự sections)
- Thay đổi animation hay motion physics
- Font chữ mới (giữ Inter, chỉ cải thiện cách dùng)

## Design Direction: "Warm Ink"

Lấy cảm hứng từ aesthetic của Vietnamese editorial (Vietcetera, báo thanh niên mới), zine analog, và social energy của Saigon:

**New color palette:**
- Background: `#EEE6D4` — ấm hơn, có chiều sâu hơn ivory hiện tại, gần màu giấy báo/tạp chí
- Surface primary: `#F9F4EA` — warm white, không phải pure white
- Surface dark: `#1A0E07` — deep warm brown-black, dùng cho hero cards (plan context, vote panel, confirmed screen)
- Surface tinted: `#E8D8BC` — toasted warm, dùng cho secondary info cards
- Primary accent: `#C8371E` — Vietnamese lacquer red (đỏ sơn mài). Specific, opinionated, memorable. Thay thế hoàn toàn blue-500.
- Secondary accent: `#3D6B4F` — muted Vietnamese green, dùng cho "locked/success" states
- Text primary: `#1A0E07` — deep warm brown-black (ấm hơn slate-900)
- Text secondary: `#5C4033` — warm brown-gray
- Text muted: `#9C8470` — warm muted

**Typography signature:**
- Xóa `.page-label` uppercase pattern. Thay bằng eyebrow labels nhỏ hơn, lowercase, không all-caps
- Hero text (greeting, screen title) lớn hơn: 32-36px
- Numbers dùng tabular figures, editorial treatment (số lớn + label nhỏ dưới)

**Surface system (3 tiers):**
- **Light** (`#F9F4EA`): default cards, content areas
- **Tinted** (`#E8D8BC`): secondary cards, stats, contextual info — đây là cái đang thiếu
- **Dark** (`#1A0E07`): hero moments — plan context strip, vote panel header, confirmed celebration

**Border & shadow:**
- Border: `rgba(26,14,7,0.10)` — warm-tinted thay vì cold rgba(0,0,0,0.07)
- Card radius: giảm từ 18-20px xuống 14-16px — less bubble, more sophisticated
- Shadow: warm-tinted `rgba(26,14,7,0.08)` thay cold `rgba(0,0,0,0.05)`

## Steps

1. **Rewrite CSS variables trong `:root`** — thay toàn bộ color system, shadow system, border radius defaults. Update shadcn `--primary` sang màu lacquer red mới.

2. **Redesign global component classes** — `.page-label` → eyebrow lowercase style. `.premium-cta-mint` → dùng màu primary mới. `.status-pill.mint` → dùng màu primary mới. Thêm `.surface-tinted` và `.surface-dark` classes mới.

3. **Update BottomNav** — active color đổi sang primary mới. Nav indicator đổi shape/color.

4. **Update Home page** — tăng size hero greeting, đổi CTA button color/style, đổi urgency banner sang dark surface.

5. **Sweep toàn bộ trang** — tìm và thay tất cả hardcoded `#3B82F6`, `rgba(59,130,246,...)`, BLUE variable sang màu mới. Đổi urgency banner, vote panels, plan cards sang dùng dark surface thay vì blue gradient.

## Relevant files

- `client/src/index.css`
- `client/src/components/BottomNav.tsx`
- `client/src/pages/Home.tsx`
- `client/src/pages/Plan.tsx`
- `client/src/pages/Vote.tsx`
- `client/src/pages/Confirmed.tsx`
- `client/src/pages/Memories.tsx`
- `client/src/pages/Pet.tsx`
- `client/src/pages/Onboarding.tsx`

     1→---
     2→name: follow-up-tasks

     4→---
     5→
     6→# Follow-Up Tasks
     7→
     8→As you work on your current task, watch for additional work that should be done as follow-up tasks — separate units of work related to your current task but outside its scope.
     9→
    10→Categorize each follow-up task using one of these categories:
    11→
    12→- **`incomplete_scope`**: Parts of the original request that you intentionally deferred to keep the current task focused
    13→- **`next_steps`**: Functionality or features users would want next, whether directly extending what you just built or addressing unmet needs in the project
    14→- **`tech_debt`**: Code quality issues, hardcoded values, shortcuts, or refactoring opportunities you noticed while working
    15→- **`test_gaps`**: Tests that should be written but aren't part of the current task's deliverable
    16→
    17→Write titles for non-technical users — lead with impact, not implementation - especially for tech debt and test gaps.
    18→
    19→Before submitting, review each title by asking: "Would a non-technical user understand what this means and why they'd want it?" If not, rewrite it. Examples:
    20→
    21→- "Store recipes in a database with full CRUD support" -> "Let users add, edit, and delete their own recipes"
    22→- "Add server-side validation for recipe API endpoints" -> "Prevent broken recipes from being saved"
    23→
    24→Before marking your task as complete, propose up to 4 follow-up tasks by calling `proposeFollowUpTasks` — NOT `bulkCreateProjectTasks` or `createProjectTask`. The `proposeFollowUpTasks` callback automatically links follow-ups to your current task as the parent — required for correct task hierarchy. Submit them all in a single call with clear titles, descriptions, and a `category` (required). Keep only the highest-impact follow-ups. Each description should include relevant file paths and enough context for another agent to pick up the work independently.
    25→
    26→Only propose follow-ups that represent genuine, actionable work.
    27→
    28→- Do not propose follow-ups that overlap with tasks already visible in the project task list
    29→- Do not propose follow-ups for trivial items or things already in your current task's scope
    30→- Do not propose follow-ups for agent housekeeping (e.g. updating replit.md, adding comments, improving documentation — handle those inline)
    31→
    32→If your current task already has downstream tasks depending on it (listed in your task assignment), skip calling `proposeFollowUpTasks` entirely — those tasks already cover the planned next steps.
    33→
    34→`proposeFollowUpTasks` is **one-shot per assigned project task** — not per turn, not per subfeature, not per `mark_task_complete` cycle. The system rejects duplicate calls. If you're marking complete again after more work on the same assigned task, review your previously proposed follow-ups; if any are now stale, call `markFollowUpTaskObsolete` to retract them.
    35→
    36→## Examples
    37→
    38→```javascript
    39→// Log the result so you have taskRefs for later use with markFollowUpTaskObsolete
    40→const followUps = await proposeFollowUpTasks({
    41→    tasks: [
    42→        {
    43→            title: "Let users save favorite recipes to a personal collection",
    44→            category: "next_steps",

    46→
    47→## What & Why

    49→
    50→## Done looks like

    52→- A "My favorites" page shows the user's collection

    58→        },

    61→            category: "tech_debt",
    62→            description: `# Save recipes permanently so they aren't lost on refresh
    63→
    64→## What & Why

    66→

- **What is done correctly:** root token overhaul in `index.css` is directionally correct (warm palette, red primary, warm borders/shadows, reduced radii, shadcn primary updated); `.page-label` is redesigned away from uppercase styling; status/CTA classes are recolored; BottomNav active state is migrated to lacquer red; many page-level blue usages were replaced.

Security:
- None observed (no auth, secret, injection, or privilege-scope regressions introduced by this diff).

Next actions:
1. Update `client/src/App.tsx` to Warm Ink tokens (shell background and ambient blobs), removing residual `#3B82F6` / `rgba(59,130,246,...)` and old ivory background.
2. Raise Home greeting headline to spec (32–36px) and ensure editorial weight/line-height treatment matches the stated design direction.
3. Run one final repository-wide sweep for blue-500 literals and old neutral values in user-facing UI files, then verify key screens (Home/Plan/Vote/Confirmed) in-browser for full palette consistency.
